summary.lv: Aerones Engineering, vēja turbīnu robotizēto apkopju pakalpojumu sniedzējs pasaulē, meklē AI Native Full-stack inženieri Rīgas komandai — augsta atalgojuma loma ar uzsvaru uz AI rīku izmantošanu visā produktu izstrādes ciklā.
summary.en: Aerones Engineering — the world's leading provider of robotic wind-turbine maintenance — is hiring an AI Native Full-stack Engineer in Riga: a high-paying role centred on using AI tooling across the product development cycle.
